raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 963 aims to engage and empower a new generation of voters in California.",
    "The bill requires public colleges and universities to designate a Civic and Voter Empowerment Coordinator.",
    "Institutions will develop a Civic and Voter Empowerment Action Plan to facilitate civic engagement and voter turnout.",
    "Data suggests that dedicated resources for civic and voter empowerment on college campuses improve voter turnout.",
    "Implementing best practices for democratic engagement on college campuses can enhance student voter turnout.",
